meaning: n.(西班牙和拉丁美洲的)别墅 (有葡萄园等的)乡间邸宅
examples: Relax and indulge at Quinta Real Guadalajara.
Quinta Flat Tuning mode - a world-wide first!
Impeccable service and great hospitality await you at Quinta Real Zacatecas.
He and some of the Mongolians happened to be staying at the same La Quinta Inn, in Queens.
When Carter appeared at the event in La Quinta (with parents in tow) he was there at his own expense.
